privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic conditional formatting task using LibreOffice Calc with hardcoded student score data. Verified facts: 6 students (Alice:85, Bob:58, Charlie:92, David:45, Eve:78, Frank:95) with score range 45-95. Task requires applying conditional formatting to Score column with green highlighting for scores >= 80 (Alice, Charlie, Frank) and red highlighting for scores < 60 (Bob, David), leaving Eve (78) unformatted. Timeout is 300 seconds, max 40 steps, medium difficulty. Success requires 75% (3 out of 4 criteria): data preservation (6+ rows, 1pt), ODS format (1pt), conditional formatting with at least 2 styled cells (2pts). File is saved as formatted_scores.ods. Verification parses ODS as ZIP archive, extracts content.xml, and detects background-color properties in cell styles. Data is entirely synthetic, created by setup_task.sh with no external data source.
